守勢不滴兵：打不過→主力回家門集結（不是一隻隻衝進敵方大軍）·湊夠兵才反擊: defensive posture does not trickle: outmatched → main force rallies at the home gate (not one unit at a time into the enemy army); counter-attacks only once it has the numbers
守勢時主力優先生產（守備 4 名額被收割＝漏底的桶）·平時仍先補家底守備: main force takes production priority while defending (the 4 garrison slots were being harvested = a leaking bucket); in normal times the home garrison is still filled first
發展期主力站家門集結點＝守方也集中（舊碼不下令＝散在軍營被各個擊破）: during development the main force stands at the home rally point = the defender concentrates too (the old code issued no order = spread across the barracks and beaten in detail)
視野兩側同規則：擋敵方的牆·看得過自家的牆·updateFog 真的帶 vSid: vision follows the same rule for both sides: blocked by the enemy's wall, seeing over its own; updateFog really does carry vSide
\\n[87] 攻城器架設時間（2026-07-10·使用者手感）：停下才發射／: \n[87] siege setup time (feel): fires only once stopped / movement interrupts it / shoving does not / DPS unchanged / shoreline arena
攻城器架設：只有投石車有 setup·剛移動＝未架設·靜止滿 2.5s＝架設完·: siege setup: only the catapult has one; just moved = not set up; 2.5s stationary = set up; the archer can always shoot
攻城器不邊走邊打：執行移動令途中射程內有敵也 0 發（舊碼＝relocate 順: siege engines do not shoot on the move: zero shots even with an enemy in range while executing a move order (the old code fired en route on relocate)
攻城器停下→等滿 setup 才第一發；之後照 cd 連發（架設是機動性的代價·: siege engine stops → waits out the full setup before the first shot, then fires on cooldown (setup is a mobility cost, not a DPS cost)
友軍推擠不打斷架設（separation 不寫 movedT＝物理擠壓不是重新部: being shoved by a friendly unit does not interrupt setup (separation does not write movedT: physical crowding is not redeployment)
岸邊擂台：一邊純陸兵一邊純戰艦→地圖對半切陸/水（純陸擂台不受影響）: shoreline arena: land-only army on one side, warships on the other → the map splits half land, half water (the pure land arena is unaffected)
\\n[88] 攻城器/投石船 硬撐續打（2026-07-10·使用者手感）：有: \n[88] siege engines and siege ships hold their ground (feel): do not back off while something else is shootable; retreat only when the last target is in your face
攻城器替代目標：貼臉的（<minRng）不算·只挑射程帶內打得到的遠敵: siege engine alternative targets: anything inside minRng does not count; it picks only the distant enemies it can actually hit
攻城器硬撐續打：貼臉+遠敵都在→守住位置續打（不為了一隻貼臉的後撤）: siege engine holds and keeps firing: in-your-face and distant enemies both present → holds position and keeps shooting (it does not retreat over one unit at melee range)
攻城器只剩貼臉一隻→後撤（沒有別的可打才退·拉開距離且不站著打）: siege engine with only the in-your-face unit left → retreats (it backs off only when there is nothing else to shoot, and opens the distance rather than standing and firing)
投石船同理：被貼臉時也優先打射程帶內的別的目標（minRng45）: siege ship likewise: when closed on, it still prefers another target inside its range band (minRng 45)
\\n[89] R0 資料表化（specs/13 十·2026-07-12）：四: \n[89] R0 turning the design into tables: completeness of the four tables + reverse lookup of the derived sets + a swordsman dry-run (add a row, change no code) + personality binding strength
R0 表完整性：兵種表 AI 欄（role/thW/repl/ulk）＋派生集合: R0 table completeness: the unit table's AI columns (role/thW/repl/ulk) + the derived sets are correct
R0 派生表反查：剋制=bonus 反查·表徵=uniq 派生·角色錨=fron: R0 derived-set reverse lookup: counters = reverse lookup of bonus; tells = derived from uniq; role anchors = front/ranged/mobile/siege/support
R0 科技表 AI 欄：效果域（eco/mil/def/intel/sea）全覆: R0 tech table AI columns: effect domains (eco/mil/def/intel/sea) fully covered + prerequisite tiers (shared vs a civilisation's final step)
R0 文明表三列完整＋難度表欄位正交（每列同欄位集）: R0 all three civilisation rows complete + difficulty table columns orthogonal (every row carries the same column set)
R0 劍士 dry-run：加 UT 一行→編隊認得（剋星反查/配比想要/軍營排: R0 swordsman dry-run: add one UT row → the formation system picks it up (counter reverse lookup / mix demand / barracks queue / threat count); removing the row restores everything
R0 個性綁定強度：bind 0＝個性錯配而文明不變·bind 1＝貼合·全難度: R0 personality binding strength: bind 0 = personality mismatched while the civilisation is unchanged; bind 1 = matched; every difficulty carries a civilisation (even Beginner has an identity)
\\n[90] R1 評分制核心（specs/13 三·2026-07-12）：: \n[90] R1 the scoring core: three regression assertions from past mistakes + market tier 7.2 + saving up does not freeze the standing items
R1 踩雷①：預留綁生產端＝承諾在集軍費買不動·撤掉承諾同庫存立刻買得動（因果對: R1 mistake ①: the reservation binds at the production end = a commitment cannot be bought against while the army fund is being raised; withdraw the commitment and the same stock buys immediately (causal control)
R1 踩雷②：預留對得上放置條件＝觸發不成立不入集（零預留）·觸發成立才入集/蓋: R1 mistake ②: the reservation matches the placement condition = an unmet trigger never enters the pool (zero reserved); only a met trigger enters it and gets built
R1 踩雷③：收入分帳＝升代存錢期市場買/村民生產照常流動（存錢桶不鎖現有庫存）: R1 mistake ③: income is split into shares = market buys and villager production keep flowing while saving for an age-up (the savings bucket does not lock existing stock)
R1 市場 7.2 分級：困難 balance 主動平衡賣盈餘·新手 rescu: R1 market tier 7.2: Hard actively balances by selling its surplus; Beginner's rescue mode does nothing without a shortfall; a bad exchange rate blocks the buy until it drifts back
\\n[91] R2 地圖參數化（specs/13 九·2026-07-12）：: \n[91] R2 parameterising the map: scaling assertions (the main acceptance test) + G2 march coefficient (a winding route is not a straight line) + liveness of the knobs wired to the table
R2 縮放斷言：可採量×2→村民目標↑·圈外簇 2→4→開拓上限↑（specs/: R2 scaling: gatherable amount ×2 → villager target rises; clusters outside the home radius 2→4 → outpost cap rises (the main acceptance test)
R2 縮放斷言：防守點（開拓中心 1→3）→塔量 +2·可建設空間↑→再生上限↑: R2 scaling: defensive points (outposts 1→3) → tower count +2; more buildable space → renewable cap rises (the count-based cap is retired)
R2 接表旋鈕活性：villF/outF 動→村民目標/開拓上限跟著動（死旋鈕條: R2 knob liveness: move villF/outF → the villager target and outpost cap move with them (an early warning for the dead-knob clause)
R2 G2 行軍係數：同直線距離·彎路圖 marchC > 直路圖（量路不量尺）: R2 G2 march coefficient: same straight-line distance, but the winding map's marchC > the straight map's (it measures the route, not the ruler) + the static first estimate is corrected by the route
R2 時間參數平移：先驗曲線隨行軍係數（C=2＝t0/per 平移·t=300: R2 time parameters shift: the prior curve follows the march coefficient (C=2 = t0/per shift, t=300 still 0)
\\n[92] R3 工事與擴張（specs/13 六·2026-07-12）：: \n[92] R3 fortifications and expansion: expansion by difficulty (the !T.ageUp dead knob retired) + the tower decision chain (false positives / difficulty thresholds / no duplicate cover / a guard rail) + wall personality
R3 擴張難度分級：困難主動擴張(含升代中·!T.ageUp 死旋鈕退役·實際蓋: R3 expansion by difficulty: Hard expands actively (including mid age-up; the !T.ageUp dead knob is retired; outposts really do get built, >0); Beginner expands only once its home radius is exhausted (reactive)
R3 塔決策鏈：騷擾 1 次不觸發(誤報防護)·2 次觸發(困難門檻)·新手門檻: R3 tower decision chain: one raid does not trigger (false-positive protection); two does (Hard's threshold); Beginner's threshold is higher; a mine that already has a tower is not covered twice
R3 鐵龜護欄：塔量到 aiTowerCap 即止(不無上限排擠經濟): R3 turtle guard rail: tower building stops at aiTowerCap (no unbounded count crowding out the economy)
R3 牆個性：速攻(蒙古)完全不築牆·鐵龜(神羅)免守勢主動先築·均衡(英)回應: R3 wall personality: the rusher (Mongol) never walls; the turtle (HRE) walls pre-emptively without waiting to be on the defensive; the balanced civilisation (England) is reactive
\\n[93] R4 情報管線（specs/13 四·2026-07-12）：三: \n[93] R4 the intelligence pipeline: three-state urgency / scouts at every difficulty / no instant replacement on death / boss switches after repeated losses / 4.5 the anti-bluff clock
R4 三態急迫度：剛看過低·久沒見/新兵種高·對手安靜中（情報域需求分數·4.1: R4 three-state urgency: low right after a sighting; high when nothing has been seen for a while or a new unit type appears; medium when the opponent is quiet
R4 全難度生斥候（4.3：新手/困難/魔王都生·亂走定位敵家·非只魔王）: R4 every difficulty produces scouts (Beginner, Hard and boss alike; they wander and locate the enemy base — this is not a boss-only behaviour)
R4 斥候死了不立刻補（4.4：情報新鮮＝需求已滿足＝不補·無冷卻計時器）: R4 a dead scout is not replaced immediately (fresh intelligence = the demand is already met = no replacement, and no cooldown timer either)
R4 魔王連死 2 次＝改用出兵順路偵察不再養（4.4）: R4 boss switches to scouting en route with its army after losing 2 scouts in a row, and stops maintaining them
R4 4.5 防騙鐘：單次瞥見不算·連續朝我推進兩次才算·遠離歸零（誤判代價低）: R4 4.5 anti-bluff clock: a single glimpse does not count; only two consecutive approaches towards me do; moving away resets it (the cost of a false read is low)
\\n[94] R3/R4 fable review 修正（2026-07-12: \n[94] R3/R4 review corrections: the 6.5 early-warning difficulty gate + Beginner's exhausted check includes natural food and wood + a new game clears the scout-death baseline
R4 修正·6.5 預警難度閘：魔王 confirmed＝巡邏隊回集結點候敵·困: R4 correction, 6.5 early-warning difficulty gate: a confirmed sighting sends the boss's patrol back to the rally point to wait; below Hard there is no early warning (patrols behave as before)
R3 修正·新手 exhausted 含天然食木：圈內只剩漿果＝不擴張·採盡才出: R3 correction, Beginner's exhausted check includes natural food and wood: only berries left inside the radius = do not expand; go out only once it is genuinely gathered out
R4 修正·新局清斥候死亡基準（_scN/scoutDeaths·防上局殘留誤計: R4 correction: a new game clears the scout-death baseline (_scN/scoutDeaths, so last game's losses cannot be counted as consecutive)
\\n[95] R5 軍事生產與供養（specs/13 八＋7.4·2026-0: \n[95] R5 military production and upkeep: counter thresholds (at scale / relative to my own army / no flapping) + the siege standard-issue curve / boss driven by intelligence + upkeep ceiling (food cut off → the army shrinks) + unique-unit upkeep scoring
R5 8.2 剋制門檻：1 隻不轉＝與無目擊逐位一致（釣魚不抖動）·成規模轉·相: R5 8.2 counter threshold: one unit does not shift the mix (identical to no sighting at all, so bait cannot make it flap); a real number does; and it is relative to my own army (a small army shifts for a single knight)
R9 攻城時間爬升曲線（難度分級）：黑暗/發展=0·困難 age2 基數2/3·: R9 siege ramp-up curve by difficulty: Dark/development = 0; Hard age 2 base 2/3; +1 in the Castle age; ramps with time spent on the offensive (bounded); the defender snapshot is gone; boss has a higher base and ceiling
R5 7.4 供養上限（review 連續式）：常態非約束·食源被清＝starv: R5 7.4 upkeep ceiling (continuous): not binding in normal play; with the food supply cleared it shrinks before starving even hits (a live path down the stock slope); starving drops it to the floor; supBuf tiers; fishing boats count towards food capacity
R5 8.4 專屬兵供養評分：解鎖即帶表徵（長弓）·供養緊繃＝少頂替保軍隊數量（: R5 8.4 unique-unit upkeep scoring: the tell arrives with the unlock (longbow); when upkeep is tight it substitutes fewer of them to keep the army's headcount (not a fixed ratio)
\\n[96] R6 軍團與戰術線（specs/13 五·2026-07-13）: \n[96] R6 groups and the tactical line: the reinforcement column finally fixes trickling + two safety lines + the feint/raid detachment (1-tick recall fixed) + resource guards and construction guards + D1 wave threshold inverted / no strength comparison + D2 target tiers and attack priority
R6 5.1 增援隊（D7 滴兵終解·全難度）：主力出征＝生產改掛增援隊·未湊滿: R6 5.1 reinforcement column (the final fix for trickling, at every difficulty): with the main force away, production is assigned to the reinforcement column; it waits at home until it is up to strength, marches as a formed body, merges into the main force on arrival, and merges in place when the wave ends
R6 5.5 佯攻騷擾隊（魔王·修 1 tick 召回）：攻勢期出擊·窗口內不召: R6 5.5 feint/raid detachment (boss; 1-tick recall fixed): sorties during an offensive, is not recalled inside its window, disbands when the window closes, does not detach below the main force's safety line, and the mobile party goes straight for visible villagers (focus)
R6 5.1 兩安全線＋難度分隊：新手/普通不分巡邏隊·困難守備滿編才分·守備被: R6 5.1 two safety lines + detachment by difficulty: Beginner and Normal never detach a patrol; Hard detaches only once the garrison is at full strength; a thinned garrison absorbs the patrol back (the squads knob is live)
R6 6.1 派兵配套：魔王資源守衛常駐被騷擾的使用中礦區（沒人用＝轉移/回家·: R6 6.1 detachment support: boss keeps a standing resource guard on a mine that is in use and being harassed (unused = it relocates or goes home; Hard has no such party); Hard guards a tower site until completion then leaves (Beginner does not guard at all)
R6 5.2 D1/D5：波門檻方向反轉（新手7<普通10）·新手/普通不比強弱: R6 5.2 D1/D5: the wave threshold is inverted (Beginner 7 < Normal 10); Beginner and Normal do not compare strength (running into a large army just raises the threshold, they still attack); Hard compares and does not sortie if it would lose
R6 5.3 D2 目標分級＋攻擊優先序：新手朝中樞（無選擇邏輯·rule 就近: R6 5.3 D2 target tiers and attack priority: Beginner heads for the town centre (no selection logic, rule = nearest); Normal takes the nearest economy; Hard varies its target (drawn from the seed); counter = units > towers and castles > other buildings
\\n[97] R7-pre 觀戰小修批（2026-07-13）：鏡射放置過 c: \n[97] R7-pre spectator fixes: mirrored placement goes through canPlace = no more overlaps + equal counts of each building type per side + a symmetric exploredE placement gate + iron under a footprint is sealed and stops regenerating
R7-pre ④ 鐵礦封存：被牆/農田壓住＝不再生（採空蓋牆合法·再生不回填）·: R7-pre ④ iron sealed: covered by a wall or farm = no regeneration (walling over a mined-out node is legal, and regrowth must not refill it); uncovered nodes regenerate as normal; demolish and it resumes
R7-pre ① 對稱化起手：鏡射放置過 canPlace＝無疊放·兩側同型建築: R7-pre ① symmetric opening: mirrored placement goes through canPlace = no overlaps; equal counts of each building type per side; mirroring still applies; exploredE filled; blocked bookkeeping complete
R7-pre 觀戰完整狀態面板：建築＝生產佇列有顯示·軍事單位＝軍團歸屬（主力）: R7-pre spectator panels show full state: buildings = production queue shown; military units = group membership (main force); villagers = task list (smoke test throws nothing)
\n[98] R7a \"hitting accurately\": scouts made per-side + E2 manual control and observation posts + E4 scouting en route + D2 weak + the two-party siege split / pure harassment + tower-ring stop-loss + regrouping in place / retreat turned into attack + U2 research hunger
R7a 斥候 per-side 化：side1 怕敵塔不避自家塔·殘影 per-: R7a scouts made per-side: side 1 fears enemy towers and not its own; last-seen ghosts are per-side so it cannot see the future; explored area is each side's own (side 0's semantics are unchanged)
魔王斥候按需操控：情報過期＝手動派一隻到觀察點（火圈外·只一隻）·新鮮＝放回自走: boss scouts under manual control on demand: stale intelligence = one scout is sent by hand to an observation post (outside the tower ring, exactly one); fresh = it is released to wander rather than loiter at the gate; below Hard there is no manual control
R7a E4 出兵順路偵察：斥候連死＋情報過期＝主力路徑注入觀察腿·情報新鮮＝不: R7a E4 scouting en route: dead scouts + stale intelligence = an observation leg is injected into the main force's path; fresh intelligence = no detour (causal control)
R7a D2 tgtSel weak：魔王挑守備最薄弱點（守備重的近點讓位給開闊: R7a D2 tgtSel weak: boss picks the thinnest-defended point (a heavily defended near target yields to an open far one); the defence score points the right way; the knob is wired (hard still uses vary)
R7a 5.3 攻城兩隊制：攻城器分出 g4 攻城組（focus＝任務建築）·防: R7a 5.3 two-party siege split: siege engines are detached into group g4 (focus = the mission building); the escort party returns to the default priority order; the party merges back into the main force when the mission ends
R7a 5.3 純騷擾模式：目標區守備太硬＝只獵兵/村民不啃建築·開拓中心例外可: R7a 5.3 pure harassment mode: a target area defended too heavily = hunt units and villagers only, do not chew on buildings; outposts are the exception and may be attacked; the party withdraws afterwards; undefended = ordinary harassment (causal control)
R7a 塔火圈目標停損：AI 單位塔火下追不上＝放棄+拉黑（不耗死）·玩家單位不: R7a tower-ring target stop-loss: an AI unit that cannot catch its target under tower fire gives up and blacklists it (rather than dying to it); player units are unaffected
R7a U2 研發饑餓（單項升格收入分帳）：攻勢期+age2 缺攻城解鎖＝回溯前: R7a U2 research hunger (promoting a single item to an income share): on the offensive in age 2 without siege unlocked = walk the prerequisites back, M1 → U2 → medic U3, into the bucket (exp) and actually research it; during development, or with everything unlocked, no promotion (it is bounded)
R7a 5.4 原地整理：輕傷+有醫療兵+無敵在場＝停頓補血（guard）·補滿: R7a 5.4 regrouping in place: lightly wounded + a medic present + no enemy in sight = pause and heal (guard); resume the advance once topped up (attack)
R7a 5.4 撤退轉打：魔王被壓＋敵主力離家＋自家守得住＝改攻空虛的家（fli: R7a 5.4 retreat turned into attack: boss under pressure + the enemy's main force away + its own home holding = attacks the empty base instead (flip; committed for the window); Hard in the same position still retreats home
\\n[99] R7b「打得巧」（specs/13 5.2/5.6/D5·202: \n[99] R7b \"hitting cleverly\": picking the moment + detaching to raid when the enemy's main force is away + blockade without assault + trading bases + naval-land coordination + shura/god following the boss
R7b 5.2 挑時機①：對手剛受重損+己方完好＝窗口內門檻放寬出兵·己方同傷/: R7b 5.2 picking the moment ①: the opponent has just taken heavy losses and I am intact = the sortie threshold is relaxed inside the window; equally damaged, or Hard, or the switch off = as conservative as ever (three-way control)
R7b 5.2 挑時機②：敵主力離家＝發展期放行分隊騷擾（而非主力壓上·沒抽佯攻: R7b 5.2 picking the moment ②: the enemy's main force is away = a raiding detachment is released even during development (rather than committing the main force, and even with no feint plan drawn); the enemy comes home = the party is pulled early
R7b D5 圍而不打：處處太硬＝封資源點（noBld·主力獵村民）·攻城組照分: R7b D5 blockade without assault: everything is too hard = blockade the resource nodes (noBld; the main force hunts villagers); the siege party still detaches to shell from range = a stand-off bombardment; the window expiring forces a re-evaluation; the fortification falling reverts to eco (causal control); the switch is live
R7b 5.2 換家：家門壓境打不贏+敵家無工事+剩多座都市＝直撲敵中樞（all: R7b 5.2 trading bases: losing the fight at my own gate + no fortifications at the enemy's + more than one city left = go straight for the enemy town centre (allin; committed for the window, no falling back to defend); only the capital left, or the enemy is fortified, or the switch is off = do not take the bet (three-way control)
R7b 5.6 主動呼叫：困難+家門戰鬥貼水岸＝艦隊應召就地支援·護漁更優先（重: R7b 5.6 calling for support: Hard + a fight at the home gate next to water = the fleet answers and supports in place; escorting fishing boats still outranks it (an important task is not dropped); below Normal there is no call
R7b 5.6 魔王兩面攻擊：主力任務中海線同時施壓（均勢就敢壓+岸轟敵中樞面）: R7b 5.6 boss attacks on two fronts: while the main force is on its mission the naval line applies pressure at the same time (it dares to push at parity, and shells the enemy's town-centre-facing shore); Hard's fleet stays put in the same position (causal control)
R7b 5.6 新手基本登陸（佔島無難度閘）＋十一節 shura/god 跟隨魔: R7b 5.6 Beginner still performs a basic landing (taking an island has no difficulty gate) + shura/god follow the boss's settings (tgtSel weak / squads dynamic) + the ablation switches are wired
\\n[100] R10 致動器修理包（撲擊承諾／集結閂／醫療隨軍·2026-0: \n[100] R10 actuator repair kit (commitment to the pounce / rally latch / medics marching with the army): three execution-layer faults fixed = both sides actually fight (a prerequisite for ML)
R10-a 撲擊承諾：allin 撲中樞窗內只認崩潰地板不認一般平價撤退（治攻方: R10-a commitment to the pounce: inside an allin window on the town centre, only the collapse floor counts, not an ordinary break-even retreat (fixes the attacker always bouncing back); it does retreat below the floor; with the switch off it retreats as before (three-way control)
R10-b 集結閂：發展期夠久＋無威脅＋主力沒湊夠＝騷擾/資源守衛隊收攏回主力·: R10-b rally latch: long enough in development + no threat + the main force under strength = the raiding and resource-guard parties are pulled back into it; the garrison stays home (the safety line is not broken); with the switch off nothing is pulled back (causal control)
R10-c 醫療隨軍：增援隊只剩醫療兵＋主力在外＝直接開拔追主力（治醫療死鎖）·: R10-c medics march with the army: a reinforcement column of nothing but medics + the main force away = it marches immediately to catch up (fixes the medic deadlock); with the switch off it stays home under strength (causal control)
\\n[101] R11 ML 戰略腦（單顆線性 policy·只掛魔王+·ar: \n[101] R11 the ML strategic brain (one linear policy, boss and above only, argmax with no RNG, able to fall back): feature dimensions / mount gate / mode → actuator mapping / investment split / determinism / degenerate fallback (causal control)
R11 特徵：維度＝AI_ML_FN(26)·全值有限且正規化在 [0,1]·6: R11 features: dimension = AI_ML_FN(26); every value finite and normalised into [0,1]; 6 modes
R11 掛載閘（因果對照）：無 policy 不掛·boss+policy 掛·: R11 mount gate (causal control): no policy = not mounted; boss + policy = mounted; Hard = not mounted; master switch off = not mounted; switch back on = mounted again
R11 mode→致動器：commit→allin＋建 base 任務＋記 R1: R11 mode → actuator: commit → allin + build a base mission + record the R10-a commitment; defend → defensive; develop → development; harass → pressure
R11 投資分配：inv→mlInv 乘子（eco 2.0/mil 0.5/te: R11 investment split: inv → mlInv multipliers (eco 2.0 / mil 0.5 / tech 1.0, clamped to [0.4, 2.5]) = the domain weight multiplier in aiWtOf
R11 確定性：同輸入 aiMlDecide byte-identical（無: R11 determinism: aiMlDecide is byte-identical for the same input (no RNG = the same seed replays identically)
R11 退化 fallback（因果對照）：同模式 >AI_ML_STUCK 且: R11 degenerate fallback (causal control): the same mode for more than AI_ML_STUCK while behind = hand back to the rule brain; not stuck = no fallback
\\n[102] R12 段 2 戰技致動器（打帶跑選用／軍隊進駐／巡邏活化／塔: \n[102] R12 stage 2 tactical actuators (opt-in kiting / garrisoning the army / activating patrols / towers shooting buildings): four execution-layer actuators = live for the rule brain at Hard and above + a discrete ML override + observable state (causal control + ablation)
R12 2a 打帶跑選用（per-group·困難+·因果對照＋消融）：遠程隊撞: R12 2a opt-in kiting (per group, Hard+, causal control + ablation): a ranged group meeting pure melee = kite; enemy ranged = does not trigger; the switch off = always counter; the override forces kiting; two thresholds give hysteresis (hold inside the band, revert when it breaks); observation wired
R12 2b 軍隊進駐（困難+·因果對照＋消融·⑧ 已降級成軍團級）：殘血+受威: R12 2b garrisoning the army (Hard+, causal control + ablation; ⑧ demoted to group level): wounded + threatened + near a tower = garrison; healthy or no enemy = do not; the switch off = no hiding; healed or the threat gone = come out; the override forbidding it = forced out; observation wired. ⑧ discriminator: average health low = the whole group goes in (including the healthy one); average health fine = the whole group stays out (including the one about to die = per-unit micromanagement really is gone); the whole group ejects and clears holdB; AICMD leaves no per-unit gate
R12 2c 巡邏活化（困難+·probe 定位·消融對照）：巡邏閘從守備滿編放: R12 2c activating patrols (Hard+, located by probe, ablation control): the patrol gate is relaxed from a full garrison to the garrison core being in place (nDefCur>=2) = when the garrison's archers are stuck on cash, production can reach the patrol (military spending still yields to the economy, keeping the R1 ledger); the switch off restores the old full-strength gate = 0 patrols
R12 2d 塔打建築（因果對照＋消融）：射程內無單位＝打敵建築·有單位＝打單位: R12 2d towers shoot buildings (causal control + ablation): no unit in range = shoot enemy buildings; a unit in range = shoot the unit (the building takes no damage; units always come first); buildings under construction come first; the switch off = towers do not shoot buildings (the old !e.size)
\\n[103] R12 段 3 攻城協同＋醫療整補（護送同步／落單後撤／醫療產: \n[103] R12 stage 3 siege coordination and medical recovery (escort synchronisation / withdrawing when stranded / the medic production line / topping up the wounded): four points of execution discipline = live for the rule brain at Hard and above + a discrete ML override (3d) + observable state (causal control + ablation)
R12 3a-1 護送同行（因果對照＋消融）：增援隊有攻城＝門檻改看護送戰鬥兵力: R12 3a-1 escorts march together (causal control + ablation): a reinforcement column with siege in it = the threshold switches to the escorting combat strength (2 catapults with no escort = stay home; escort assembled = march together); the switch off = the old behaviour, walking alone; no siege in the column = the threshold is unchanged
R12 3a-3 增援縱隊收攏（因果對照＋消融）：開拔後護送兵跑贏砲＝縱隊拉開＝: R12 3a-3 the reinforcement column closes up (causal control + ablation): after marching, escorts outrunning the guns = the column stretches = the whole party waits in place; travelling together = keep going; the guns catch up = the latch releases and it moves on; the switch off = no waiting (the guns are left behind)
R12 3a-2 攻城收攏閂（因果對照＋消融）：行軍中砲掉隊>AI_ESC_LA: R12 3a-2 siege catch-up latch (causal control + ablation): a gun falling more than AI_ESC_LAG behind on the march = the main force stops and waits; keeping up = keep pushing; the gun catches up = the latch releases; waiting too long = push on with a cooldown (it is not dragged to death by a straggler); the switch off = no waiting
R12 3b 落單後撤（因果對照＋消融）：護送不足持續 AI_SG_T＝攻城組撤: R12 3b withdrawing when stranded (causal control + ablation): escort below strength for AI_SG_T = the siege party withdraws to the nearest friendly fortification; inside the grace period it does not (anti-flap); with an escort = it does not; the switch off = it stands there and dies; the escort rejoining = handed back to the reinforcement column (closed loop); observation wired
R12 3c 醫療產線（因果對照＋消融）：發展期也養 1（U3 已研）·全攻期隨: R12 3c medic production line (causal control + ablation): keep 1 even during development (once U3 is researched); grows to 2~3 with army size during a full offensive; the switch off = the old behaviour (0 in development, 1 on the offensive); Normal = the difficulty gradient is unchanged
R12 3d 殘血整補循環（因果對照＋消融＋override）：均血<50%＝退: R12 3d topping up the wounded (causal control + ablation + override): average health below 50% = fall back to the nearest friendly fortification; healthy = keep pushing; healed to 75%, or no medic and timed out = resume the mission (closed loop); inside a commitment window it does not trigger (the bet does not sabotage itself); the switch off = wounded push on regardless; the override can force or forbid it; Normal does not top up
\\n[104] R12 段 1 攻堅牆（拆點步進／投石到位·2026-07-1: \n[104] R12 stage 1 breaking through walls (chewing the perimeter / getting the catapults in place): charging the town centre becomes \"nibbling the perimeter\" = nibble is the rule brain's default at Hard and above + a discrete ML override (assault) + observable state (causal control + ablation)
R12 1a 拆點步進（因果對照＋消融＋override）：周界有防禦建築＝挑「: R12 1a chewing the perimeter (causal control + ablation + override): a defended perimeter = pick the thinnest point as an intermediate target (thinnest beats nearest); no candidate, or only targets behind = go straight for the town centre (never backwards); the main force order points at the intermediate target; demolishing it = the window continues and the anchor moves forward to the next one; the switch off, or override direct = the old behaviour, straight at the centre; override nibble beats the ablation; override blockade = surround without assaulting (and is not rebuilt every tick); Normal does not do this (difficulty gradient); observation wired
R12 1b 投石真到位（因果對照＋消融）：攻城組被指定打「中間目標」（周界最薄: R12 1b the catapults really get in place (causal control + ablation): the siege party is assigned the \"intermediate target\" (the thinnest tower on the perimeter, which it can reach) rather than a town centre 84 tiles away; the switch off = back to the town centre (the old behaviour = never in range); the \"in place and firing\" observation count is wired
\\n[105] R12 工地火圈重驗（使用者 2026-07-16 觀戰回報「: \n[105] R12 re-verifying construction sites under tower fire (from spectating: \"two blue villagers heading for the outpost, right next to it and unable to get in\"): a site covered by an enemy defence ring that arrived later = the order is cancelled on the spot and nobody is sent + the whole footprint is checked when picking a spot (causal control + ablation)
